original text:
Let's talk temples! As we age, our temples begin to hollow due to natural fat and bone loss, often resulting in a sunken appearance. Our Nurse Injector Cheryl can reverse this effect by giving gentle volume to your temples with Juvéderm. . This month only, purchase a Temples package and your Brilliant Distinctions points balance will and applied towards your treatment. Plus you will receive: . 🔹 Two 1ML syringes of Juvéderm dermal filler 🔹 PLUS an additional 400 BD points! . You could save hundreds off your next treatment - contact us to take advantage!
The VI Peel process!! Call us today to schedule a consultation to get our peel information and see if you're a candidate! . . . 💆‍♀️Treatment: VI Peel 🔎 Why: VI Peels help reduce the appearance of sun damage, acne and acne scarring. VI Peels work on a cellular level to turn over skin and rejuvenate your face. ⏱ Time : 25-30 minutes 🤰: If you are pregnant or nursing you are not eligible for this treatment. 💊: If you are currently on Accutane, you are not eligible for this treatment. 💵 Price: $250 📍Location: Deux Rose Beauty Refinery 600 S. 6th Street LV 89101 📲 Call: 702-683-2831 to book 💻 Book online: deuxrose.com 🤳: Client gave their consent for this image to be posted. All images are taken by the staff of Deux Rose Beauty Refinery.

original text: Marion Pauw (1973) is an author, freelance writer, and copywriter. In 2005 she made ​​her debut with Villa Serena.Her final breakthrough to the general public was with Daylight (2008), which won the Golden Noose. Then she wrote the successful Sinner Child, Jetset, and her first novel, The Wilden. Jetset well as Sinner Child are filmed by NL Film. Daylight has been filmed by Eyeworks, starring top actors like Angela Drive, Fedja van Huet, and Monique van de Ven.
